resources.description: Central repositories and archives collected by UITS students.

items.title: UITS Exam Repository
items.description: A centralized archive of past mid and final exam question papers collected by UITS students.

items.title: CSE Lecture Notes Drive
items.description: Curated Google Drive folders containing course slides, lab codes, and student notebooks.

resources.description: Boilerplates and toolkits to excel in tech contests and projects.

items.title: oU1TS Hackathon Survival Kit
items.description: Templates, boilerplate codes, and guidelines for rapid prototyping in web, mobile, and AI contests.

items.title: Interactive Career Roadmaps
items.description: Role-based career roadmaps and educational guides to help you pick your professional track.
